_comment: Canonical OperatorDocument shape. g8ed is the authority — it creates, owns, and stores this document in SQLite. g8ee reads it via g8ed HTTP API and g8es KV cache. g8eo is the source of runtime data (heartbeats) that g8ed merges into this document. A field mismatch between g8ed and g8ee breaks operator binding, context building, and AI execution.
_comment.field_naming: FIELD NAMING CONVENTION: The canonical OperatorDocument uses 'id' as the primary key field name (core_identity.id). Wire format models and projections (e.g., operator_status_info, bound_operator_context, operator_slot, heartbeat) use 'operator_id' for clarity in cross-component contexts where the entity type may not be immediately obvious from context. When mapping between OperatorDocument and wire formats: OperatorDocument.core_identity.id ↔ wire_format.operator_id. This naming pattern is intentional and consistent across all operator-related wire formats.
_cache_aside: g8es KV — keyed by g8e:doc:operators:{id}. Cache-aside pattern. SQLite is source of truth.

operator_document._description: Full operator record as stored in g8ed SQLite and returned by GET /api/internal/operators/:id/status and GET /api/operators/status.

id.description: Unique operator identifier (UUID v4). Mapped to 'operator_id' in wire format models and projections (see _comment.field_naming above).

user_id.description: ID of the user who owns this operator

organization_id.description: Organization ID (equals user_id in single-user orgs)

operator_session_id.description: Current active session identifier. Set when g8eo authenticates. Cleared on termination.

web_session_id.description: Browser session the operator is currently bound to. Set during bind. Cleared on unbind.

api_key.description: Platform API key used by this operator for g8ed authentication (hashed form for validation)

operator_api_key.description: Per-operator API key provisioned in the slot. Used by g8eo to authenticate to g8ed.

certificate._description: Per-operator mTLS certificate provisioned by g8ed.

status.description: Current operator lifecycle status. See status.json operator.status.

started_at.description: When the operator process first authenticated with g8ed

first_deployed.description: When this operator slot was first ever activated (persisted across resets)

last_heartbeat.description: Timestamp of the most recently received heartbeat

slot_metadata._description: Operator slot provisioning fields. Slots are pre-created by g8ed for each user.

slot_number.description: Slot index (1-based). Null for dynamically created operators.

is_slot.description: True when this document represents a pre-provisioned slot

claimed.description: True when the slot has been claimed by a running g8eo process

operator_type.description: Operator deployment type. See status.json operator.type.

cloud_subtype.description: Cloud provider. Only set when operator_type is cloud. See status.json cloud.subtype.

is_g8ep.description: True when this slot is the platform-managed g8ep operator (slot 1). Always pinned at the top of the operator list. Restart via POST /api/operators/g8ep/reauth.

slot_cost.description: Number of operator slots this instance consumes

consumed_by_operator_id.description: For slot documents: the operator_id of the g8eo process that claimed this slot

investigation_context._description: Active investigation/case context. Set when the operator is bound to an investigation session.

fingerprint._description: Top-level fingerprint columns denormalized from system_info for efficient SQLite queries.

system_fingerprint.description: SHA256 fingerprint of the operator host. Copied from system_info.system_fingerprint.

fingerprint_details.description: Structured fingerprint sub-fields. Copied from system_info.fingerprint_details.

runtime_config.description: CLI flags and env var overrides active when the operator binary was started. Sent by g8eo at bootstrap and updated on reconnect. Shape mirrors models.RuntimeConfig in g8eo wire.go.

cloud_mode.description: True when operator started with --cloud flag

cloud_provider.description: Cloud provider (aws, gcp, azure). Empty unless cloud_mode is true.

local_storage_enabled.description: True when local SQLite storage is enabled (--local-storage flag)

no_git.description: True when ledger is disabled (--no-git flag)

wss_port.description: WSS port dialled on g8es for pub/sub

http_port.description: HTTPS port dialled on g8es for auth/bootstrap

latest_heartbeat_snapshot.description: Most recent heartbeat metrics snapshot. Shape matches HeartbeatSnapshot (shared/models/wire/heartbeat.json#operator_heartbeat): nested objects for system_identity, performance, network, uptime, etc. Strictly enforced across the wire.

granted_intents.description: Granted AWS/cloud intent permissions. Always an array, empty when no intents are granted. Items are GrantedIntent objects with TTL.

operator_status_info._description: Lightweight projection of OperatorDocument returned by GET /api/operators/status and GET /api/internal/operators/:id/status. g8ee's OperatorDocument model maps to this shape.
operator_status_info._comment.field_mapping: Wire format projections use 'operator_id' instead of 'id' for clarity in cross-component contexts. This field maps directly to OperatorDocument.core_identity.id (see _comment.field_naming above).

latest_heartbeat_snapshot.description: Most recent heartbeat metrics snapshot (nested HeartbeatSnapshot shape). Strictly enforced across the wire.

is_active.description: True when status == active. Computed field, never stored.

granted_intents.description: Active intent names (string projection of GrantedIntent objects). Always an array, empty when no intents are granted.

current_hostname.description: Denormalized hostname from latest_heartbeat_snapshot.system_identity.hostname for quick access without traversing nested objects

session_token.description: Active session token for session-based auth validation. Set by g8ed at bootstrap time.

session_expires_at.description: WebSession expiration timestamp. Null means no session expiry is enforced.
